answers.question: Why is Machine_M13 considered vulnerable?
answers.answer_text: Machine_M13 is considered vulnerable because it has a single_path_dependency of true, meaning it depends on only one essential access path (reachable_pathway_count: 1). Additionally, it has no redundant_access (redundant_access: false), so it retains no alternative access options if that single pathway fails. This makes the machine highly susceptible to isolation if its sole pathway becomes unavailable.

answers.question: Why is Pathway_T003 associated with Machine_M01?
